cleavage agent: peptides were obtained after overnight incubation with trypsin at 37°C.
enrichment method: Affinity purification: Cells were collected as above and resuspended in lysis buffer... for affinity purification with HA-conjugated agarose beads.
fractionation method: were observed to co-sediment as a single complex on sucrose gradients.
fragmentation method: fragmentation was performed in higher-energy C-trap dissociation (HCD) mode
instrument: Peptide analysis was performed by ultra-high performance liquid chromatography (Dionex Ultimate 3000 UHPLC, Thermo Fisher Scientific) coupled with tandem mass spectrometry (Q Exactive, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: we used stable isotope labelling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) and quantitative proteomic analysis
reduction reagent: 100 mM DTT at room temperature for 20 min.
